name: Baklava ( Papadakis Taverna)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a medium bowl, mix together the cinnamon and walnuts.
2. Brush the bottom of a 14-inch x 20-inch baking dish with butter. Place one pastry sheet in the dish and brush it with butter. Repeat to line the bottom with 6 buttered pastry sheets.
3. Sprinkle 1/3 of the nut mixture over the top of the pastry sheets. Repeat, creating 3 layers of nut mixture alternating with 4 layers of 6 buttered pastry sheets, ending with 6 pastry sheets.
4. Cut the baklava into 40 diamond-shaped pieces. Insert a whole clove into each piece.
5. Preheat the oven to 350°F. Bake the baklava for 40 minutes, or until golden brown.
6. In a medium saucepan, combine sugar, water, orange peel strip, lemon peel strip, and cinnamon stick. Bring to a boil, then simmer for 5 minutes.
7. Add honey and bring mixture to a boil. Remove pan from heat, add lemon juice, and stir ingredients together. Let syrup cool before drizzling over the hot baklava. Cover with a towel and let sit for 1 hour before serving.
